brand.name: NayePankh Foundation
brand.mission_statement: Empowering underprivileged youth through education, mentorship, and opportunity.
brand.logo_usage: Always maintain clear space equal to the height of 'N' around the logo.

linkedin.cta_style: Direct — 'Apply now', 'Partner with us', 'Read our report'

email_newsletter.cta_style: One primary CTA button, placed at the end

post_templates.volunteer_spotlight:

"[Short quote from volunteer]"

Thank you, [Name]! 💛 [Hashtags]
